prompt: A moody editorial street-fashion poster shot in a narrow urban alley, featuring a young woman in a dark navy oversized tracksuit with white double side stripes, sitting crouched on the sidewalk and leaning against a black metal roll-up shutter beside a sticker-covered utility pole. She has dark hair tied in a messy top bun with loose bangs, and wears chunky black, white, and gray sneakers. The pose is relaxed and introspective, with both knees drawn up and the body turned slightly left. Use soft natural late-afternoon sunlight coming from the right, creating warm highlights and long shadows, with a shallow depth of field that blurs the alley background. The overall look is cinematic, slightly grainy, and realistic, like a Japanese youth fashion magazine cover. Place clean white typography in the top left reading: "youth vibes", then smaller text "2025 spring", then two lines of Japanese text: "ゆるくて、かっこよくて、" and "わたしらしい日々。" Add large handwritten white Japanese copy on the upper right in four stacked lines: "お気に入りの", "スウェットで、", "今日も", "自由にいこ。" with a casual hand-drawn underline arrow beneath it. Add bold oversized white sans-serif title text in the lower left: "street" on one line and "note." below it. Beneath that, add smaller white text: "wear your mood." and "live your youth." In the bottom left corner add tiny white text: "vol.07" and "soft groove". Portrait orientation, full-body fashion composition, gritty urban backdrop, premium magazine layout, understated cool-girl energy.
